name: Web search chatbot with Exa and Claude
description: Takes a user question, searches the web with Exa for current information, feeds the results to Claude AI for an informed answer, and posts the response to Slack with source links.

source.originalName: AI chatbot that can search the web

exaKey.description: Exa connection key for web search

slackChannel.description: Slack channel to post the answer

question.description: The question or topic to search and answer

steps.name: Build chatbot prompt with web context
Build Slack Block Kit chatbot response
